records.question: Which contestants received votes on or before 2018-03-09 19:03:36 from states listed in the area code state data?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT contestants.contestant_number FROM contestants
JOIN votes ON contestants.contestant_number = votes.contestant_number
JOIN area_code_state ON votes.state = area_code_state.state
WHERE votes.created <= '2018-03-09 19:03:36'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.contestant_number FROM CONTESTANTS AS T1 INNER JOIN VOTES AS T2 ON T1.contestant_number = T2.contestant_number INNER JOIN AREA_CODE_STATE AS T3 ON T2.state = T3.state WHERE T2.created <= '2018-03-09 19:03:36'

records.question: Which contestants named Tabatha Gehling received votes on or after 2018-03-09 19:03:21?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT contestants.contestant_number FROM contestants
JOIN votes ON contestants.contestant_number = votes.contestant_number
WHERE contestants.contestant_name = 'Tabatha Gehling' AND votes.created >= '2018-03-09 19:03:21'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.contestant_number FROM CONTESTANTS AS T1 WHERE T1.contestant_name = 'Tabatha Gehling' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VOTES AS T2 WHERE T2.contestant_number = T1.contestant_number AND T2.created >= '2018-03-09 19:03:21' )

records.question: Which contestants named Alana Bregman received votes created exactly on 2018-03-09 19:03:40 from phone numbers at most 5112677315?

WHERE votes.phone_number <= 5112677315 AND contestants.contestant_name = 'Alana Bregman' AND votes.created = '2018-03-09 19:03:40'
